name: M1A2 SEPv3 Abrams
description: The premier American main battle tank featuring composite armor, 120mm smoothbore cannon, and advanced fire control. The SEPv3 upgrade adds improved networking, power generation, and Trophy active protection.

specialAbilities.name: Trophy Active Protection
specialAbilities.description: Hard-kill active protection system intercepts incoming anti-tank missiles and RPGs before impact.

specialAbilities.name: Depleted Uranium Armor
specialAbilities.description: Chobham composite armor with DU mesh inserts provides exceptional protection against kinetic penetrators.
